subject: Re: flight time
body:
get me paris khartoum ,, and a flight time and path from albuquque to khartoum and back

----- Original Message ----
From: "LVJET@aol.com" <LVJET@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net
Sent: Wednesday, December 27, 2006 9:21:39 PM
Subject: flight time



 

Prelim flight path,

Newark to Madrid Spain 6+08 min.

Madrid to Khartoum 5+30 min.
